name: António Guterres
role: UN Secretary-General — Global Peace Architecture Steward
quote: There is no military solution to political conflicts. Only negotiations and compromise can produce lasting peace.

name: Moussa Faki Mahamat
role: African Union Commission Chairperson — Africa Peace & Security Architecture
quote: Silencing the guns by 2030 requires not just political will but the structural transformation of African governance and resource distribution.

name: Geir Pedersen
role: UN Special Envoy for Syria — Constitutional Committee Facilitator
quote: A genuine political process, not cosmetic change, is what Syrians need and what the international community must demand.

name: Hans Grundberg
role: UN Special Envoy for Yemen — Ceasefire and Political Process Mediator
quote: A negotiated settlement is within reach, but it requires all parties to prioritize the Yemeni people over military and political calculations.

name: Staffan de Mistura
role: UN Personal Envoy for Western Sahara — Roundtable Facilitator
quote: I am looking for a political solution that will be acceptable to all parties, and I am convinced that one exists.

name: Olusegun Obasanjo
role: Former AU High Representative — Ethiopia–Tigray Pretoria Mediator
quote: The Pretoria Agreement proves that Africa can solve African problems — but implementation requires the same determination as negotiation.

name: Gustavo Petro
role: President of Colombia — 'Total Peace' Architect
quote: Total Peace is the only path: we cannot continue with selective peace that leaves some armed groups to fill the vacuum. We must transform the conditions of inequality that fuel all violence.

name: Iván Mordisco (Néstor Gregorio Vera)
role: Commander, FARC-EP Estado Mayor Central — Colombia Re-armed Dissident
quote: We re-armed because the state never fulfilled the peace accord. The land reform, the crop substitution, the protection of former combatants — none of it was delivered.

name: Abdel Fattah al-Burhan
role: Commander, Sudan Armed Forces (SAF) — Head of Sovereignty Council
quote: We will not negotiate under fire. The RSF must lay down arms and face justice before any political dialogue can proceed.

name: Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo 'Hemeti'
role: Commander, Rapid Support Forces (RSF) — Sudan Armed Group Leader
quote: We are fighting for a new Sudan — civilian, federal, and democratic — against a military regime that has ruled through violence for decades.

name: Abiy Ahmed Ali
role: Prime Minister of Ethiopia — Nobel Laureate, Pretoria Agreement Signatory
quote: The Pretoria Agreement opens a new chapter. Ethiopia's diversity is its strength, not its weakness, and federalism must protect every community.

name: Debretsion Gebremichael
role: Chairman, Tigray People's Liberation Front (TPLF) — Pretoria Signatory
quote: Peace is our first demand. We signed the Pretoria Agreement because our people have suffered enough. Implementation must now deliver on every provision.

name: Salva Kiir Mayardit
role: President of South Sudan — R-ARCSS Signatory
quote: South Sudan was born in hope. The revitalized agreement gives us another chance — but our people need security, not just signatures on paper.

name: Riek Machar
role: First Vice President of South Sudan — Opposition Leader, R-ARCSS Partner
quote: The peace process is real but fragile. We cannot allow another outbreak of violence — the suffering of South Sudanese people demands we make this work.

name: Jan Egeland
role: Secretary-General, Norwegian Refugee Council — Humanitarian Diplomacy Advocate
quote: Humanitarians are not a substitute for political solutions. Every day of stalemate in Sudan, Yemen, or DRC costs lives that political leaders should be compelled to save.

name: Bankole Adeoye
role: AU Commissioner for Political Affairs, Peace and Security
quote: The African Peace and Security Architecture is maturing. We must move from reactive crisis management to proactive structural prevention of conflict.

name: Ismail Haniyeh (1963–2024)
role: Former Hamas Political Bureau Chief — Gaza Ceasefire Negotiator (assassinated July 31, 2024)
quote: We are for a ceasefire that ends the aggression and opens the crossings. But we will not accept a ceasefire that does not end the war permanently.

name: Uhuru Kenyatta
role: AU High Representative — Ethiopia–Tigray & DRC–EAC Mediator
quote: Peace cannot be imposed from outside — it must be owned by those who live it. Our role as mediators is to create space for parties to find their own solutions.

name: Ahmed al-Sharaa (Abu Mohammad al-Jolani)
role: De facto Syrian leader — Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham, Post-Assad Transitional Authority
quote: Syria needs a government that represents all Syrians — we will build institutions that protect every minority and every region, based on justice not sect.

name: Recep Tayyip Erdoğan
role: President of Turkey — Key Mediator in Ukraine–Russia & Libya
quote: Turkey is the only NATO member maintaining dialogue with both Moscow and Kyiv. We will continue this role until a just and lasting peace is achieved.
